uin_code.source_quote:
Digit Health Insurance Policy 
UIN: GODHLIP25039V022425

grace_period.source_quote:
The grace period for payment of the premium for all types of insurance policies shall be: fifteen days where 
premium payment mode is monthly and thirty days in all other cases.

free_look_period.source_quote: The insured person shall be allowed free look period of thirty (30) from date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote:
after expiry of initial 30 days from the first Policy Start date or day one from the 
first Policy Start date as per opted and mentioned in policy schedule

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote:
Waiting period of 9 months shall apply from the date of inception of the first 
policy with us, provided that the policy has been renewed continuously with us without break, with maternity 
as a benefit.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Go Digit Health covers all day-care up to SI; ~100 listed procedures)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: Basis 1: Co-payment of 25% in the First Year of this Optional cover being Opted, 10% on First Renewal.

policy_term_options_years.source_quote:
The Insured has taken a multiyear policy of policy period of 3 years with annual sum insured of 
INR 3 Lakhs.

ayush_coverage.source_quote:
We will pay the Medical Expenses for Your In-patient Treatment, taken under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha or 
Homeopathy.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: SECTION 4. MATERNITY BENEFIT WALLET & NEWBORN COVER

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby Benefit Digit Simplification: Your babies need all the love, care and cover they can get.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: We will pay You for the following incurred Medical Expenses in respect of organ transplantation: a) For the harvesting of the donated organ subject to plan opted and availability of the Sum Insured under Section 1. Hospitalization Cover.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: SUM INSURED BACK UP Digit Simplification: We will provide a back-up Sum Insured which will be 100% of your Sum Insured amount. We shall provide you 100% of the Sum Insured as a backup under Section 1.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while confined at home under any of the following circumstances: i.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote: We will pay You for the Medical Expenses incurred by You outside India. This is up to the Sum Insured as mentioned in your Policy Schedule against this section and as per plan opted by You.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: We will pay for the expenses incurred towards cost of health check-up which will be available from Day 1 of the Policy, subject to details mentioned in the Policy Schedule, subject to following conditions: a.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote:
Cashless facility means a facility extended by the Insurer to the Insured where the payments, of the costs of 
treatment undergone by the Insured

geographic_coverage.source_quote: The Air ambulance services will be limited within India only and NOT overseas in any condition whatsoever.

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote:
aggregately for all insured 
members for a Floater Policy.

room_rent_capping.value: No room rent limit or category restrictions
room_rent_capping.source_quote:
there are no room rent limit or category 
restrictions!
